case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. JONATAN A JERONIMO DOMINGO

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
ORDER CASE DIMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-23-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO NOV-14-2019 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. PARTIES MUST APPEAR AT MAY-23-2019 HEARING IF AGREEMENT IS NOT MET. IF NO APPEARANCES CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROGRESS REPORT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT DOMINGO, JONATAN A JERONIMO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-18-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-18-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-23-2019 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY PRICILLA TOVAR LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT JOHATAN JERONIMO DOMINGO IS PRESENT. PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. IF NO APPEARANCES THE MATTER IS TO BE CONTINUED FOR 6 MONTHS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$55.00) SERVED NOV-10-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DOMINGO, JONATAN A JERONIMO
